no: Yeslick for BG2 SoA-ToB If using a cleric mod with an appropiate (ie: Clangeddin) kit and a releveler, probably better to leave him as regular F/C and assign him the kit later.

conflicts.reason: Choose one Yeslick in BG2. BG1NPCinSoA auto-skips its Yeslick if standalone detected.
conflicts.source: BG1NPCinSoA tp2 REQUIRE_PREDICATE NOT FILE_EXISTS_IN_GAME lk#yesl.cre. Fixed stale comp_b (removed unrelated Water Gardens reference), 2026-03

a: Pixel Kaiser, K'aeloree, ArtemiusI, Lava Del'Vortel; Gwendolyne
sum: This mod brings Yeslick from Baldur's Gate to BGII: SoA and ToB, with an extensive variety of banters and interjections, a new kit (Alaghor of Clangeddin) as well as a number of PC dialogues throughout the game.
au: Pixel Kaiser, K'aeloree and Lava Del'Vortel

co.scn: Yeslick NPC for BGII: SoA & ToB

co.n: Yeslick is a Fighter-Alaghor of Clangeddin (cleric kit)
co.scn: Yeslick NPC for BGII: SoA & ToB
co.no: Makes Yeslick a Fighter/Alaghor of Clangeddin (cleric kit). Dwarven war-priest of the Father of Battle.
